name: cross_arch_t5_succession
stability_target: Phase A h_abi pre-computed reference (exact checkpoint)
lm_loss_path: forward_raw -- pure T5 backbone, no ABI
claim: T5-large backbone fine-tuned on WikiText-2 for 1000 steps with ABI stability constraint (pre-computed Phase A h_abi reference, proj_in frozen, alpha=1.0, LM loss via forward_raw bypassing ABI) retains >= 50% transfer efficacy. Efficacy = (raw_ppl_post - zero_shot_ppl) / (raw_ppl_post - cold_start_ppl). Closes backbone-update invariance for encoder-decoder architectures.
